title: Soknar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Soknar.jpg|thumb|Cene wielding her Soknar]]
The '''Soknar''' was [[Cene Gilvent]]'s customized weapon, built by her partner, master smith [[Mlatar Thon Gra]].

It combined a [[Somreth tri-blade]] of the [[Drevun Six]], the [[Barnax]] [["Twenchok" foil]] and the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]] [[sat'skar]].

The name ''soknar'' referred to the [[Taloron]] word for "several".

The weapon, being heterodox, was customized to adapt to Gilvent's own heterodox fighting skill.
